entities.name: RAINFED ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: An environmental condition used for identifying high-yielding genotypes

entities.name: SELECTION INDEX
entities.description: A tool used to identify high-yielding genotypes based on secondary traits

entities.name: SECONDARY TRAITS
entities.description: Traits used within a selection index that are less sensitive to genotype-by-environment interactions than yield

entities.name: GENOTYPE-BY-ENVIRONMENT INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environment affecting trait expression

entities.name: CORRELATED RESPONSE OF SELECTION
entities.description: A concept used to measure the relative efficiency of selection indices

entities.name: MEDIAN AND SEMI INTER-QUARTILE RANGE INDEX
entities.description: A specific selection index based on median and semi inter-quartile range used to identify high yielding genotypes

entities.name: ELSTON INDEX
entities.description: A specific selection index used as a benchmark for efficiency
